title: RandomFul's Vanilla Reborn
description: RandomFul's Vanilla+ Modpack that will get updated and shown off on his Twitch.
body:
# Vanilla Reborn

Welcome to Vanilla Reborn, a carefully curated Vanilla Plus modpack designed to enhance and rejuvenate your Minecraft experience. With a collection of 167 handpicked mods, Vanilla Reborn introduces a better experience for Vanilla Minecraft. Verison 1.1 has finally added Server/Client sided mods. This will able to expand the experience.

## Future updates?

This modpack will get often updates to improve the overall experience. I want to make this modpack more multiplayer friendly and progression friendly. 

## How can I put input in? 

Join my discord! Make sure to select the modpack notifcations for any polls and updates getting added/changed.
